## Description

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code strictly follows the zero-dependency philosophy.
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests in `src/test/`.
- [ ] I have verified my logic against the Chaos Engine (`chaos.test.ts`).
- [ ] My code passes `npm run test:coverage` (95%+) and `npm run format:check`.
